scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix backend" "wait-on http://localhost:3000/health && npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.dev:memory: cross-env STORAGE=memory concurrently "npm run dev --prefix backend" "wait-on http://localhost:3000/health && npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.dev:postgres: cross-env STORAGE=postgres concurrently "npm run dev --prefix backend" "wait-on http://localhost:3000/health && npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
